description: "Inactivated on 11th Apr,2012, mail by Vishwanath Gopalkrishnan because of  "As a part of the annual stock correction we need to send 1890 pcs from vishudh back to the brand" Composition Black printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with a mock wooden button chest placket, black yoke with traditional mango print, short sleeves with thin pink piping and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by traditional Indian print and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The mix-and-match print on the yoke adds zing to the garment. Team it with jeans, leggings or loose pyjamas and flats. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
